Patch Set 1:

As safe as this looks, it has unintended side effects, now with this patch on tests 101 and 102 crash all the time for me with this assertion:
osd_destroy()) ASSERTION( !lu_object_is_dying(dt->do_lu.lo_header) ) failed

This looks somewhat similar but not quite like LU-8060 and I hit this like all the time.

Patch Set 1:

I filed LU-9808 for this

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

Maybe we should break up this patch into two separate patches, one for each test, and see if adding back only one test will survive Oleg's testing or not.

parents.subject: LU-12120 grants: prevent negative ted_grant value

commit.subject: LU-9581 tests: remove recovery-small test from ALWAYS_EXCEPT
commit.message:
LU-9581 tests: remove recovery-small test from ALWAYS_EXCEPT

recovery-small test 52 is not run during testing,
by adding the test number to the ALWAYS_EXCEPT list,
due to bugzilla bug number 5493.

Remove recovery-small test 52 from the ALWAYS_EXCEPT
list and start running this test again.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=recovery-small
Signed-off-by: dilip krishnagiri <dilipx.krishnagiri@intel.com>
Signed-off-by: James Nunez <jnunez@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I50e30831ee5af8e063dc4b6197141fed365535b6
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/27382
Reviewed-by: Emoly Liu <emoly@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Wei Liu <sarah@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Jenkins
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
